request: READ-ONLY CONSENSUS REVIEW R9. Data repo hygiene/git sync/privacy lens. Inspect <machine-local-path> plus sync/public-data evidence if needed. Decide whether this exact revised document is adequate. Output short rationale plus AGREE or REVISE_REQUIRED. Do not modify files.
